proposal.working_title: Automation to Delegation Explained: How Mid-Market Operators Hand Off Decisions to AI Agents Safely
proposal.one_line_angle: Most AI advice still optimizes automation, automating one human task at a time. Mid-market scaling requires delegation: giving an agent end-to-end ownership of a decision loop. This post lays out the four-stage handoff (boundary mapping, escalation rules, evidence logging, weekly audit) that turns ChatGPT from a copy machine into a colleague.
outline_bullets: Why Automation Stops Scaling Around 80% of Operator Decisions
The Four-Stage Delegation Handoff: Boundary Mapping, Escalation Rules, Evidence Logging, Weekly Audit
How To Tell If An AI Agent Is Ready For Decision Ownership (And What To Pull Back When It Is Not)
proposal.cannibalization_rationale: no overlap detected against current inventory
